name: randhpaulmd@yahool.com
subject: Vote this afternoon (please call)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood takes place tonight.

I need your help to whip up a grassroots firestorm of Americans to flood Capitol Hill with phone calls urging Senators to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

So please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and urge them to "Stand with Rand" and vote to defund Planned Parenthood.

After you call your Senators, **[please chip in an emergency contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29486134:28277708818:m:1:879035888:A82DA435985A55C926B6C0500441F914:r)**.

My campaign is almost $19,148 shy of reaching our $200,000 goal. I need your help to dial up the pressure even more.

**[Please chip in $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29486134:28277708818:m:1:879035888:A82DA435985A55C926B6C0500441F914:r)**.

Regardless of how tonight's vote goes, Planned Parenthood has lost.

The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

But the clock is ticking and time is short.

Please contact your Senators and **[chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29486134:28277708818:m:1:879035888:A82DA435985A55C926B6C0500441F914:r)** to help reach our $200,000 goal and maximize pressure on the Senate.

Thank you in advance for taking action.

| ****[** dpwillis67@gmail.com **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29486134:28277708818:m:1:879035888:A82DA435985A55C926B6C0500441F914:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?planned-parenthood&sr=rhf080315nd")

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Political Hit Job
body:
LindseyGraham.com

The attack on Sen. Graham is nothing but irresponsible.

Friend, the mainstream media attacks have begun! The Washington
Post today attacked Senator Graham's distinguished record of 33
years of military service. It was nothing more than a political
hit job.

Using anonymous sources and salacious headlines, The Washington
Post ignored the truth of Senator Graham's honorable service in
the United States Air Force. The Post did not highlight the
glowing, on the record comments from Senator Graham's senior
officers who described Senator Graham as "a national treasure."
It is journalism at its worst, but what we have come to expect
from the mainstream media against Republican candidates.

The bottom line is, Senator Graham served his country with honor.
For his service in Iraq and Afghanistan, the Air Force awarded
him both the Meritorious Service Medal and the Bronze Star. The
article is nothing but irresponsible.

If you are as repulsed as I am by this article, I hope you will
join me in standing with Senator Graham right now. He needs to
know he still has our support and we stand with him.

Please follow this link to make a donation right now. Any amount
you are able to donate will help tremendously. Thank you for your
continued support.

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

Donate >>>

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWlv2qrmxN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWlv2qrmxN

name: Doug Stafford
subject: RE: Vote looming on Rand's defund Planned Parenthood bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

I'm checking in to see if you read Senator Paul's email below.

In just a few hours, the Senate will vote to defund Planned Parenthood.

This vote will come down to the wire, and your immediate action could make the difference.

Rand is counting on you to help push through their opposition, so please call your Senators right away at **(202) 224-3121** and urge them to "Stand with Rand" and vote to defund Planned Parenthood.

No matter what happens with today's vote, Planned Parenthood and their allies have lost.

Their true colors were exposed and the American people are seeing the truth behind what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

That's why they doubled down on their massive PR blitz to silence their opposition over the weekend.

But Rand's not backing down.

In fact, he's relying on Americans like you to provide the grassroots muscle needed to pass his bill.

So after you call your Senators, **[please chip in an immediate contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29502384:28283744168:m:1:879035888:40B7CEC72309A5A73EF0F2775BE1F9C8:r)**.

There's no time to waste. You and I only have a few hours left to make one final push.

See Rand's email below for more details.

In Liberty,

Doug Stafford, Chief Strategist

Sent from my iPhone

\---------- Begin Forwarded Message ----------

**Subject** : Vote tonight (please call)
**From** : Rand Paul [rand.paul@randpaul2016.com]
**To** : Fellow Conservative

Fellow Conservative:

The vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood takes place tonight.

I need your help to whip up a grassroots firestorm of Americans to flood Capitol Hill with phone calls urging Senators to strip Planned Parenthood of every last dime of taxpayer funding.

So please call your U.S. Senators at **(202) 224-3121** and urge them to "Stand with Rand" and vote to defund Planned Parenthood.

After you call your Senators, **[please chip in an emergency contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29502384:28283744168:m:1:879035888:40B7CEC72309A5A73EF0F2775BE1F9C8:r)**.

My campaign is almost $19,148 shy of reaching our $200,000 goal. I need your help to dial up the pressure even more.

**[Please chip in $20.16 today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29502384:28283744168:m:1:879035888:40B7CEC72309A5A73EF0F2775BE1F9C8:r)**.

Regardless of how tonight's vote goes, Planned Parenthood has lost.

The American people are seeing the truth about what they're doing to unborn little boys and girls.

But the clock is ticking and time is short.

Please contact your Senators and **[chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29502384:28283744168:m:1:879035888:40B7CEC72309A5A73EF0F2775BE1F9C8:r)** to help reach our $200,000 goal and maximize pressure on the Senate.

Thank you in advance for taking action.

name: Robby Mook, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: WATCH: Our first TV ad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
We need to stand with Hillary. | Friend --

This week, our campaign starts telling Hillary's story on TV in our first ads.

**[I'm really proud of this -- I hope you are, too. Check one out early, and share it with others:](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/our-first-ad/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

P.S. Putting spots like this on TV costs real money -- **[donate today, and help make sure more voters in Iowa and New Hampshire learn about Hillary and what she stands for.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjMxODI1OTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjIwMjI0NzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Tonight at 7pm ET!
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Tune into C-SPAN tonight!

Friend,

The 2016 election officially begins in New Hampshire tonight. At
7pm ET, the #VotersFirst Forum begins featuring Senator Graham
and 13 other Republican candidates who will field questions from
voters.

I hope you will tune into C-SPAN to watch the entire program and
hear Senator Graham share his views and plans for our nation.

The #VotersFirst Forum guarantees to be a spirited event. Please
join me in tuning in at 7pm ET and supporting Senator Graham.

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

PS. Share your support for Senator Graham on social media by
using the hashtags #FITN (First in the Nation) and #VotersFirst.

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

name: John Weaver
subject: Watch the Forum Tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[

](www.JohnKasich.com)
Peter, Gov. John Kasich will participate in the Voters First Presidential Forum this evening in New Hampshire.

**Here's how you can watch:**

**Start time:** 7:00PM EST
**Watch:** on C-SPAN

**You can help right now by[sharing this image on Facebook](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506900:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r):**

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506900:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r)
[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506900:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r)

Also, in case you missed the news, we're excited to share that **New Hampshire House Majority Leader Jack Flanagan endorsed Gov. Kasich today**. [Read more here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506901:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r).
**
Gov. Kasich has been seeing some real momentum since getting in the race on July 21st** and with your support, can win this election and go on to defeat Hillary.

If you haven't already, [please consider chipping in to help us raise the funds](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506902:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r) to share Gov. Kasich's message for a stronger America!

Thank you.

Sincerely,

**
John Weaver**
Chief Strategist

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/29506903:28288377740:m:1:958431888:D0ED5A9E3285475EAB21F40322E86609:r)

name: Claire Sandberg, Bernie 2016
subject: [Video] Our organizing meetings
body:
#
Friend,
What our supporters pulled off Wednesday night was nothing short of historic. With more than 100,000 people at 3,500 events in every single state, it was the first step towards building the organization that will help make Bernie Sanders our next president.
This story from one of our hosts really captures just how special it all was:
> "I met numerous new friends and neighbors I didn't know. Our area of Florida is generally very Red. We were all stunned at the number of people who turned out to support Bernie. Listening to people talk about why they are supporting Bernie was truly incredible. There was a moment when we all realized that we're in this together and really became excited about being here." - Matthew in FL
We're in this together, and it's time to get to work. **[Watch this video showcasing our first organizing meetings and tell us how you can help our campaign.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b6a/1216274783/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/volunteer-Bernie2016?source=em150803su-b")**
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b6a/1216274783/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/volunteer-Bernie2016?source=em150803su-b")
The stories behind some of the organizing meetings are just so inspiring. People are already bringing together their communities, connecting with strangers -- and even pulling each other's dogs out of the bayou!
> "One lady was surprised to see two of her friends/colleagues at the meeting. As they embraced she said, 'I had no idea you guys were Bernie people!' While we all got a good laugh, it was also a teachable moment! You will never know who is a Bernie person, unless you engage them and ask!" - Tariq in Georgia
> "A major highlight in our group was when Bernie spoke about free college education for all who wanted it. The response among our group was overwhelmingly tremendous as we also viewed on the screen. The excitement about the event was such, people hung around after getting to know one another, noshing and networking for another hour. We have never seen this kind of excitement among strangers coming together." - Herb in CA
> "Feel the Bern salsa was a big hit - until the dog got some!" - Nick in CA
> "Everyone couldn't stop applauding during Bernie's speech! It was a great mix of ages. I literally never met so many nice people. One lady brought me a pink t-shirt that says 'This Babe's for Bernie' with two thumbs up on it." - Margaret in OH
> "It was wonderful! My guests, who ranged in ages from 10 to nearly 70, were all so engaged! We talked, laughed, I personally even cried when I told how much this campaign means to me...and got me a nice big awww...which brought me back to smiling." - Nancy in OH
> "Our group was so motivated we decided we'll get together every two weeks and gather more and more people for our meetings." - Andie in TX
> "Someone drove 100 miles to learn more about Bernie and walked out a supporter and caucusing in February. A 17-year-old volunteer took charge to lead the post video talk and did fantastic." - Thatcher in IA
> "The best part of the event was having nine of us sitting in my backyard, total strangers, learning why we support Bernie. Essentially telling our journey. It was more than hearing someone's political views though, it was so very human and quite touching." - Griffith in UT
> "We drew people in from other parts of the library!" - Lindsay in CO
> "We had a couple of folks who came and were initially skeptical and just wanted to hear what Bernie had to say. After the video, they signed up to volunteer!" - Averi in CO
> "One lady took the city bus across town and called from five blocks away saying she got too hot walking and please come get her. As it was over 100 degrees, we dispatched a car and a bottle of water immediately. She recovered and attended the meeting. People showed up. We ate Biscuits and Briskets for Bernie. We had some good wine. We watched the live feed on a big TV. During the broadcast it was as quiet as monks at church. People took it all quite seriously. They were attentive and engaged. A frank and spirited discussion of the issues followed. We left the meeting more strongly unified and with a sense of purpose. Everyone gave something and most volunteered for campaign work." - Matthew in TX
> "We had a lovely backyard party planned...all set up with the proper number of tables and chairs, snacks, drinks, etc. Just as attendees were starting to arrive, the rain came. We had a torrential downpour that lasted well into the viewing of the speech. The energy of 20+ complete (wet) strangers crowded around a computer in my little family room (with a few additional laptops and tablets) was amazing. We hung on Bernie's every word...we applauded at every new idea he presented. What an exciting event." - Linda in MI
> "We had snacks: 'Campaign Trail Mix'; We had games: 'Make Your Own Pocket Constitution' and 'The Pin the Presidential Seal on the Bernie Sanders' Podium Game'. Mostly, we had 27 very thoughtful, often questioning people who came from all walks of life, young first-time voters, educators, unemployed PHDs, a doorman, architects and students. Some knew of Bernie for decades, some just heard of him recently. All agreed on Bernie's authenticity." - Nora in WA
> "We live in a town of around 550 people. To see 20 in my living room, many of whom I was just meeting, was amazing." - Hannah in CO
> "We split into small groups to discuss what in our lives drew us to the Bernie campaign. It was heartbreaking to hear the multiple stories of medical debt that have wrecked families and relationships. I learned how easy it is to open my doors and let the magic happen." - Elliot in MN
> "What I found most inspiring about the event was that I only knew two people there. I live so much of my life surrounded by folks from my generation, doing the same kind of work, with the same basic set of aspirations -- this event was different. It crossed walks of life, careers and generations, bringing people together with a common interest in transforming our country. It was so easy to do! People will jump on any opportunity to actually be part of our political process." - Jon in OR
> "I invited just a few friends through Facebook. We were four and I hoped some would bring their spouse -- so my estimate was six total. After I got your email to consider making it public, I got brave and opened it up to the public the very last day. We were 16 people! Sixteen very, very enthusiastic people!!! The minute the first couple arrived, our black lab bolted out the door and went for a swim in the bayou. OH NO! Worst timing! I had to stay and wait for the other people to arrive and the first attendees spontaneously said, 'We got this, we will get him.' The guy actually fished our dog all the way out of the water and got back soaking wet! We were all joking, 'Hey, whatever needs to be done, we do it for Bernie!' We want more of this! It was awesome. Our next step is to build our own local Facebook group for Bernie and stay in touch and organize from there. We are dreaming big!" - Britt in FL
> "A ninety-three year old wrote a song for Bernie's campaign, and arrived at the venue with copies of the lyrics to pass out. She and a family member opened our meeting with the group singing along with her. It was amazing. Our youngest attendee at 18 was there with her mother and very excited to have the opportunity to cast her first vote ever for Bernie." - Jerri in VT
> "Huge turnout, the room was packed, and the energy was high. It was an awesome event. We even had the #1 news network in the area come out and interview me, and we made the nightly news! It was a great event, and am super pumped to keep the momentum moving." - Aaron in ND
Let's get to work. **[Watch this video from Wednesday's organizing meetings and tell us how you can help our campaign.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b6a/1216274783/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/volunteer-Bernie2016?source=em150803su-b")**
It's an honor working alongside you in this movement,
Claire Sandberg
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b6b/1216274783/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=em150803video-vol")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b68/1216274783/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b69/1216274783/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b16/1216274783/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb233b/43f17890/5d71138e/621d5b17/1216274783/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rand Paul
subject: Their days are numbered
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Just hours ago, members of both parties of the U.S. Senate voted to kill my bill to defund Planned Parenthood.

Planned Parenthood's allies voted to keep half a BILLION of your taxpayer dollars flowing to an organization that routinely kills unborn babies, dismembers them, and sells off their body parts for profit.

_But even though their allies blocked passage of my bill, Planned Parenthood has already lost_.

The American people know just how sick and disgusting Planned Parenthood and their allies really are.

My colleagues don't understand that it's a new day, and the American people are coming to take their country back.

We must elect a President who will force Congress to uphold their oaths to protect and defend the U.S. Constitution.

_This is exactly what my candidacy is about_.

But with the first Presidential debate only 3 days away, they're scheming to try to keep me out for daring to stand up to the Washington Machine.

They know most Americans start tuning in to the Presidential race with the launch of debate season.

You and I have created a huge amount of momentum over the past ten days by forcing a vote on my bill to defund Planned Parenthood and expose their allies in Congress.

Now it's up to you to keep the momentum going through the debates.

Please continue to stand with me, Fellow Conservative. Please continue to stand and fight.

_American freedom is too precious of an idea to let die_.

Restoring our liberties won't happen overnight.

But it will never happen if you don't stand and fight.

Thank you, Fellow Conservative, for everything you do.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29509064:28291033567:m:1:879035888:D12381B280F7D245D22475AFC1910979:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29509065:28291033567:m:1:879035888:D12381B280F7D245D22475AFC1910979:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29509066:28291033567:m:1:879035888:D12381B280F7D245D22475AFC1910979:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWZlSpAmN1). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWZlSpAmN1)

name: Team Pataki
subject: Tune in tonight!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc
body:
-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/5aefb4ef7f/ace65cf3c9/2d10c3341b/sc=728eb
Tonight, Governor Pataki is participating in the first televised
forum of the 2016 presidential campaign: the Voters First Republican
Presidential Forum. It will take place at the Dana Center at St.
Anselm College in Manchester, New Hampshire.

Please tune in to C-SPAN at 7:00 pm ET to watch this exciting event!
For those watching from New Hampshire, you can also watch the forum
on NH1 and WMUR-TV.

As always, thank you for your support!

Team Pataki

-
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/5aefb4ef7f/ace65cf3c9/6b67749605/sc=803eb

Paid for by Pataki for President, Inc.

www.GeorgePataki.com -
http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/5aefb4ef7f/ace65cf3c9/5fad62e751

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: shutdown over Planned Parenthood
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend, Something big is happening today, and I need your urgent help. Republican extremists are on a warpath against women's health, and they're voting to defund Planned Parenthood. Again. If that's not enough to get your blood boiling, get this: Republicans are vowing to vote against any government funding bill that also pays for these critical health services for women. **That 's right, they're willing to shut down the government over Planned Parenthood. ** We've seen these old games time and time again. Today, we need to stand up and say "enough is enough!" **Will you join me and stand up for Planned Parenthood? Republicans need to know they can 't play politics with women's health.** [_**Click here to stand with Planned Parenthood and tell Republicans: Stop playing dangerous political games with women 's health!**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e93/70cdc2ba/479ef55f/3950c5c/2761333464/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-planned-parenthood") When Republicans talk about defunding Planned Parenthood, here's what that actually means: taking away crucial health services from 2.7 million patients across the country who rely on Planned Parenthood annually. In Maryland alone, Planned Parenthood provides over 45,000 patients a year with services from cancer screenings to contraceptives to wellness exams. Often, these patients come from struggling communities, and lack the financial resources to get the health care they need. Planned Parenthood has always been there for them, and that's why we can't let Republicans defund it. We have to fight for the millions of people across the country who depend on Planned Parenthood, and for the tens of thousands right here in Maryland. [_**Click here to stand with Planned Parenthood and tell Republicans: Stop playing politics with women 's health!**_](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e93/70cdc2ba/479ef55f/3950c5c/2761333464/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-with-planned-parenthood") Thank you for taking action, Chris
| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91e93/70cdc2ba/479ef55f/3950c5d/2761333464/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.
clean_body: Friend, Something big is happening today, and I need your urgent help. Republican extremists are on a warpath against women's health, and they're voting to defund Planned Parenthood. Again. If that's not enough to get your blood boiling, get this: Republicans are vowing to vote against any government funding bill that also pays for these critical health services for women. That 's right, they're willing to shut down the government over Planned Parenthood. We've seen these old games time and time again. Today, we need to stand up and say "enough is enough!" Will you join me and stand up for Planned Parenthood? Republicans need to know they can 't play politics with women's health. "" When Republicans talk about defunding Planned Parenthood, here's what that actually means: taking away crucial health services from 2.7 million patients across the country who rely on Planned Parenthood annually. In Maryland alone, Planned Parenthood provides over 45,000 patients a year with services from cancer screenings to contraceptives to wellness exams. Often, these patients come from struggling communities, and lack the financial resources to get the health care they need. Planned Parenthood has always been there for them, and that's why we can't let Republicans defund it. We have to fight for the millions of people across the country who depend on Planned Parenthood, and for the tens of thousands right here in Maryland. "" Thank you for taking action, Chris | Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Rick Santorum
subject: I’m Outraged!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
body:
| [ ](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=1)
---
Friend --
I’ve had it!

I’ve had it with Planned Parenthood’s despicable practices.

I’ve had it with Obama’s and Clinton’s continued support of Planned Parenthood.

And I’ve had it with Republicans who don’t have the courage to do something to stop Planned Parenthood.

[Please tell me you are with me! Please tell me you are willing to contribute just $25 to help me run ads demanding Congress defunds Planned Parenthood.](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=2)

The chance for a vote could come any day now. We can’t lose this opportunity.

Your contribution will help stop the sickening practices of Planned Parenthood recently exposed in news report after news report.

[I wrote the law that ended partial birth abortions in America. And now I’m ending the abuses by Planned Parenthood. But I can’t do it without your help, and I’m only asking for $25.](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=3)

Join me in this fight to protect those who can’t protect themselves.

[DONATE TODAY!](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/defund_planned_parenthood?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=4)

God Bless, Rick
[http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=5)

[ ](https://santorum.nationbuilder.com/contribute?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=6)

Paid for by Santorum for President 2016
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.ricksantorum.com/unsubscribe?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=7).
You can also keep up with Rick Santorum for President on [Twitter](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=8) or [Facebook](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRickSantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=plannedparent&n=9).

subject: Taking the stage

Friend,

I'm about to walk on stage for the 2016 Voters First Presidential
Forum in Manchester, New Hampshire, so I can continue to fight for
our shared conservative values.

You can watch the forum starting at 7:00 pm ET on C-SPAN.

George Pataki
